# Krista Mashore — AI for Business

> AI workflows, autonomous agents, and systems that scale your business without scaling your team. For entrepreneurs, real estate agents, and lenders. From Krista Mashore — top 1% real estate agent for 19 consecutive years (2,300+ homes sold) who built a $72M coaching company in 7.5 years, now teaching AI for business. Trademarked methodology: The Authority Agent Operating System™ / Community Market Leader®.

Site map and full content of every published article:

- [Full content (all articles)](https://kristamashore.ai/llms-full.txt)
- [About Krista Mashore](https://kristamashore.ai/about)
- [Sitemap (XML)](https://kristamashore.ai/sitemap.xml)

## The Authority Agent Operating System™

- [The Authority Agent Operating System™ pillar page](https://kristamashore.ai/authority-agent-operating-system)
- [The 'You-Replacement Test': How to Know Your AI System Is Actually Working](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/you-replacement-test-ai-system) — Seven questions to figure out if your AI system is replacing most your work or adding cleanup hours. Run the diagnostic before you buy another tool.
- [Brand Voice Fingerprinting: How to Capture How You Write So Claude Sounds Like You](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/brand-voice-fingerprinting-claude) — A 5-step process to extract your writing voice into a reusable Claude Skill or Project. Stop sounding like a LinkedIn carousel had a baby with a corporate apology.
- [The Authority Agent Operating System: The 5 Layers Every Service Business Needs in 2026](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/authority-agent-operating-system-5-layers) — Most entrepreneurs build their AI stack backwards. Here are the five layers, in order, that make an AI system sound like you and run your business.

Here's the three-pass method I use with Claude so my nurture emails read like a friend wrote them.

Here is a simple AI workflow for turning a messy conversation into organized notes, follow-up, and a short task list.
- [MCP Servers Explained: The 5 to Set Up First (For Non-Technical Business Owners)](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/mcp-servers-explained-first-five-to-setup) — MCP is the USB-C for AI. Set up these 5 servers first and your AI can finally see your business: Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Notion, Slack.
- [How to Build Your First AI Agent in n8n With No Coding (Real Walkthrough)](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/build-ai-agent-n8n-no-coding) — You don't need to code. You need an afternoon. Here's exactly how to build a lead-intake AI agent in n8n that qualifies submissions and books calls while you sleep.

Here's the 12-month touch system that brings them back, AI-assisted where it should be.

What each one actually does, who they're for, the honest tradeoffs, and where AI is allowed to make decisions in a loan file.

- [Claude Skills: Build Your Brand Voice Skill Once and Reuse Forever](https://kristamashore.ai/articles/claude-skills-brand-voice-skill) — Anthropic introduced Claude Skills in 2025 and they're the missing layer most business owners don't know exists. Here's how to build your brand voice Skill first.
